name: Classic Ribbed Hoop Earrings
description: A bold pair of ribbed gold-finish hoops designed to instantly elevate your everyday look with premium shine and lightweight comfort.
shortDescription: Statement ribbed hoops for daily styling, office looks, parties and festive outfits.

name: Golden Based Minimal Chain
description: A delicate gold-finish chain with minimal detailing, created for customers who love subtle shine and effortless everyday elegance.
shortDescription: Minimal gold chain for layering, pendant styling or wearing solo.

name: Golden Heart Mini Pendant
description: A glossy mini heart pendant designed as a meaningful everyday piece for self-love, gifting and soft romantic styling.
shortDescription: Mini heart pendant with a simple emotional design and polished gold finish.

name: Golden Spiral Stud Earring
description: Modern spiral-shaped gold studs made for customers who want an elegant, lightweight and easy-to-wear earring for daily shine.
shortDescription: Chic spiral studs for minimal everyday elegance and modern styling.

name: Royale Twist Gold Ring
description: A textured twist-style gold ring designed to bring a royal, timeless and statement finish to your hands.
shortDescription: Textured twist gold ring with classic rope-inspired detailing.

name: Amora Heart Gold Ring
description: A romantic heart-inspired gold ring made for customers who love soft, meaningful and gift-worthy jewellery.
shortDescription: Heart gold ring with a romantic design and glossy everyday finish.

name: Elan Screw Gold Ring
description: A bold screw-design gold ring crafted for customers who prefer modern, confident and slightly edgy statement jewellery.
shortDescription: Modern screw-motif gold ring for bold and polished styling.

name: Aurora Slim Gold Chain
description: A slim gold-finish chain designed for soft everyday glow, easy layering and timeless minimal styling.
shortDescription: Slim gold chain for customers who love clean, lightweight and versatile jewellery.

name: Sunburst Statement Earring
description: A radiant statement earring inspired by sunburst detailing, made to bring attention, glow and occasion-ready elegance.
shortDescription: Bold sunburst earrings for festive, party and statement styling.
